subject: Invoice overdue - action needed
body: Hi, just a reminder that invoice #1234 is now two weeks overdue. Please process the payment at your earliest convenience or let me know if there’s an issue. Thanks, Bill

subject: Scheduled maintenance tonight
body: Hello, this is an FYI that our platform will undergo scheduled maintenance tonight from midnight to 4 AM UTC. No action is required from your side. Regards, Vendor Support

subject: Proposal draft for review
body: Hi team, I've attached the latest proposal draft. Could you please review and provide your feedback by end of day? We need to finalize before the client meeting tomorrow. Thanks, Jane

subject: [URGENT] Server disk 90% full
body: Alert: prod-05 server disk usage has reached 90%. Immediate action is required to prevent service disruption. Please free up space or expand volume as soon as possible. - Monitoring

subject: Weekly report ready
body: The weekly operations report has been generated and is available in the shared dashboard. No action is needed.
